nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Sicalis
nodes.summary: Sicalis（Sicalis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联13种鸟类，如Stripe-tailed yellow finch、Puna yellow finch、Bright-rumped yellow finch等13种鸟类。

nodes.name: Greater yellow finch
nodes.summary: The greater yellow finch (Sicalis auriventris) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Argentina and Chile. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland, temperate grassland, and heavily degraded former forest. References
nodes.shortSummary: The greater yellow finch (Sicalis auriventris) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Argentina and Chile.

nodes.name: Greater yellow finch
nodes.summary: Greater yellow finch（Sicalis auriventris）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Greater yellow finch。
